narrative:
04 congressional district has 519,694 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -9.8% D−R vs -27.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
